latin: Illam? Georgius Michaelem interrogavit de puella quam amabat. Michael dixit 'illam?' — quasi non intellegeret cur eam amaret. illam?

questions.target: Why George Michael loves the girl
choices: Why George Michael loves the girl

translation: Her? George Michael told Michael about the girl he loved. Michael said 'her?' — as if he could not understand why he loved her. Her?
